title: quercus himalayana
intro: Quercus himalayana, also known as the Himalayan oak, is a deciduous tree species native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Quercus himalayana are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
